name: Legal: single-clause verification
task: One contract excerpt states a term. Ingest it as evidence, propose one claim that reflects the term, link one evidence span as support, and export the investigation as .chronicle. No tension (single-document verification).

documents.content: Contract, Clause 5: Payment terms are net 30 days from invoice date. Late payment incurs 1.5% monthly interest.
documents.title: contract_clause5.txt
